atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports knee pain, primarily on the right side.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports knee pain exacerbated by running.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain starting during runs and intensifying.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports temporary relief with ice and ibuprofen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports running for years, including 5ks and marathons.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no previous discomfort of this level.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any recent trauma.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a family history of immune diseases.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports an unsure family history of arthritis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Blood pressure was 120/60 mmHg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Heart rate was 58 bpm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Respirations were 14 breaths per minute.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Pedal pulse was strong and rhythmic.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination revealed no redness or swelling in the right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes two tablets of ibuprofen 200 milligrams, to be taken three times a day.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes two tablets of Tylenol 500 milligrams, to be taken three times a day.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in two weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to refrain from running for two weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends good running exercises.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans physical therapy for the right knee.
